reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text:
Being a 5star hotel, service was non-existent at check-in. We had to locate our room on our own after check- in. The staff at front desk was not forthcoming in sharing the activities the hotel and repeatedly said to scan the QR code as all the information at there. No different from doing self check-in at a machine!

The toilet and shower in the room had a very musky and stale smell. 

Though the service staff at the Backstage restaurant are friendly, there are days where they are not as attentive but overall still acceptable.

As for the kids club, we were there only one day, and feel that they are lacking in manpower.
reviews.room_type: Sea View Deluxe King, Guest room, 1 King, Sofa bed, Balcony

reviews.title: Potential customers, please read
reviews.positives:
When you are staying at a 5* resort, as a customer, you expect the highest standards, well at least, I do.

After a 3 nights stay, this is what can honestly say about it:

Hotel itself 9.5 
(new building, everything you would ever need, it's there)
Hotel surroundings 7.5
(It doesn't have a beachfront, big minus compared to other 5* nearby resorts)
Hotel facilities 10
(3 pools, gym, 2 restaurants, lots of bathrooms)
Food 8.5
(Tasty and affortable but after 3 days you realise that is not that diverse. Since the hotel is 15 driving minutes away from the nearby restaurants, you are pretty much stucked within thier facilities)
Services 6
(I believe that the services make the difference when comparing 5* resorts and unfortunately, I need to say that here, they are not that good)
reviews.negatives:
As already mentioned, services are very important and sadly, theirs are not on par with the asking price or what they advertise.

For example, went to get a haircut and a beard trimming and let me tell you, it was disaster. They were charging prices as per a professional barber but their shop didn't had the right equipment to begin with. I had to make noise to not be charged and had to fix things myself. In total, I wasted 3 and half hours to basically cut my hair and trim my beard in their hotel room.

One time, after havind lunch at one of their restaurants,  had to ask 3 times my bill just to be able to pay. We were maybe 5 tables at that time...so, yeah.

On a different day, one family that was next to our pool bed, waited to a plain pizza almost 45 minutes...we ere maybe 6 couples at that time...so, yeah.

There are a few previous reviews talking about the same  quality in their services...and although this establisment replied to then saying that they will pay more attention to this...it appears that they are good only at copy pasting words than actually fixing stuff.

Overall, I would much rather take my changes with other large hotel chains such as Hilton or Hyatt than going somewhere where I already know in advance that I will be having such type of quality.

reviews.title: Beautiful hotel with outstanding service, but poor soundproofing and lack of bathroom privacy made t
reviews.positives: We had a lovely stay overall! The hotel’s facilities are absolutely beautiful, and the staff went above and beyond.Their service was truly impeccable. Overall, the excellent service and beautiful surroundings were the main positives of our experience.
reviews.negatives: Unfortunately, the room itself lacked proper soundproofing, and we could hear nearly everything from the corridors and neighbouring rooms. Additionally, the bathroom design offered little privacy or sound insulation, which made our stay less comfortable than expected.

reviews.title: Unhelpful Response from Reception During Eruption
reviews.text:
I would like to bring to your attention an issue that occurred during my recent stay at your hotel. At that time, there was an eruption, and our staff was trying to reach me in my room. However, the reception refused to transfer the call to my room. As my phone was turned off, my staff was urgently trying to contact me to remind me about my flight.

Unfortunately, the reception was not helpful, and their reason for not transferring the call was that they did not wish to disturb the guest. Given the circumstances, this was an urgent matter that required immediate attention, and such assistance would have been greatly appreciated.

I hope the management can review this matter and ensure that, in the future, urgent calls are handled with better understanding and flexibility.

Thank you for your attention to this matter.

reviews.title: Overall Amazing but Disappointing at Small Details
reviews.text:
Unexpectedly disappointing at several small details: 
(1) Bathtub in room has obvious non-removable dust attached at the bottom & cannot be removed.
(2) Small amount of clay / soil is found in the shower area.
(3) Handwashing soap disappeared & no new soap is provided after 1st daily room cleaning.
(4) Occasionally malfunctioning control panel of the air-conditioner, which cannot be switched off.
(5) One staff confirmed a dinner reservation is made for us but later we found out there is no reservation made.
(6) No smart TV options available (e.g. Netflix, YouTube, Screen-mirroring with phone, etc.) 
(7) Woken up by pre-set alarm on our 1st night of sleep. Maybe the hotel should make sure no alarms are set for the next guest unless requested.

However, there are many unforgettable and amazing parts:
(1) Exceptional nice food. Tried STEAKSMITH and Tanah Liat, they both made incredeble steak and dishes. Love every dishes and the staffs there.
(2) Very kind, supportive, welcoming staffs. Every staffs are talkative and made us feel important to them. 
(3) Nice design and easy access of swimming pools.
(4) Convenient nearby beach access with free shuttle bus.
(5) Very comfortable size of room.

reviews.title: Wonderfully relaxing stay with the best buffet breakfast we've ever had
reviews.positives: Breakfast was the absolute highlight, we looked forward to it every morning - incredible selection and variety, I've never seen a breakfast buffet like it before. Delicious and even included barista made coffee! Also loved the beds, very comfortable, I slept so well. Nice decor, wonderful staff - shout-out to Rio and Budi who were so attentive and lovely to chat with! The pool area was so good we barely left, we meant to go out and do things but it was SO relaxing, comfortable, and stress-melting to lie in the pool bed thingies and order food/cocktails and relax 😍
reviews.negatives: Whilst the dinner food was okay, it could have been better quality (breakfast far exceeded dinner in quality). Cocktails weren't as well balanced as they could be - they were solid, not bad, but not great (e.g. mojitos were pretty good, espresso martini was solid but a little too sweet, many of them slightly too syrupy/sweet). I'm being very nitpicky just to provide feedback, though - overall everything was wonderful :) also we have high cocktail standards!

reviews.title: Not quite Mariott Bonvoy standards
reviews.text:
The hotel has nice landscaping and facilities are new. If you are a fan of steak, this hotel has an excellent steakhouse which you simply must try.

However, location is relatively far from beaches, which we initially thought was easily-accessible vide bicycles since the hotel provides bicycles on a first-come-first-served basis. Shuttle buses were available though. 

Note that there is construction on-going nearby so the piling noise pollution was a major concern during the day. But worst of all was the daily breakfast non-management where guests have to wait for 20-30 mins for a table. It would have been much smoother if guests could just waltz in to find their own tables.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe King, Guest Room, 1 King, Sofa Bed, Balcony

reviews.title: Beautiful but not for a beach holiday
reviews.positives:
Absolutely amazing facilities in the hotel, all new and clean. Really loved decor in the room.
Friendly staff, always ready to help. 
Great variety of food for breakfast (even dumplings, pepper beef and noodle soup!) - one of the most delicious breakfasts I’ve ever had.
reviews.negatives:
All the great impression from the hotel is spoiled when you come to the hotel beach. To get to the sea you have to walk through garbage! I think that a good maintenance of the beach should be a must for a 5 stars hotel. 
It’s quite expensive inside - Sydney CBD prices (water in the pool bar for 5 AUD).
Very minor but I didn’t like the location of jacuzzi in the spa building - it’s right next to the toilets and there was a really bad humidity smell when I was there.

reviews.title: A lovely hotel but don’t visit on Lunar New Year
reviews.text: We stayed for a week thinking the hotel location in Nusa Dua meaning we’ll be able to have some R&R and enjoyed our baby moon. We didn’t realise that the fact that it’s CNY weekend meaning the hotel is packed with very noisy people who are quite rude and inconsiderate of others including to staff. We ended up staying in the room most of the time and didn’t enjoy any amenities due to how packed and dirty they are. Food in the restaurant is 10/10. Staff service is outstanding. I do feel really bad of how they were treated by other guests. But location is just outside the Nusa Dua area that I know and quite hidden so it’s not really favourable to walk outside the resort. Keep aside some extra transportation money as it’s costly to get around from Nusa Dua to other part of Bali.

reviews.title: We loved the resort. It was very clean, and the staff were extremely friendly, polite, and helpful—they truly catered to
reviews.positives: The property was beautiful and relaxing, had to travel quite a distance to see all of the highlights of Bali, but I loved the resort.  The buffet breakfast mornings was excellent, food nice and hot, the staff were very friendly a lovely vacation resort.
reviews.negatives:
We had a great overall experience with no major complaints. The highlights of Bali tours were incredible—although it took several hours to get there, the journey was definitely worth it.

We also hosted a birthday dinner for 14 people at the Asian restaurant. While the food was good and the waitstaff were very friendly, the kitchen struggled to handle a group of our size. Dishes were served at different times, and some guests did not receive their meals at all. In some cases, appetizers and main courses arrived simultaneously for the same person.

With better coordination in the kitchen and more consistent timing of service, the dining experience could be significantly improved.

Food was decent, maybe a little more flavor is needed.

reviews.title: Pleasant
reviews.text:
I love the bed and pillows, the best one during my stay in Bali ( I stayed at 3 different places, 3 nights in Bali).
The room is spacious but not so clean particularly in the bathroom, water stains that showed it has been cleaned properly for over some period of time - a rare sight for premium hotel room. The sea view did not meet my expectation because the beach is actually far from the hotel which I thought they have the private beachfront. There was a night wedding event downstairs which somewhat ruined my peace. The loud speaker and musics were disturbing when I tried to enjoy the full moon view from the balcony. The staff was a mixed of friendly and hostile. The one who was genuinely friendly was the staff sent the breakfast to my room. They arranged for early breakfast because I had to check-out early. Other staff were not as genuinely friendly compared to any other hotels or resorts I stayed across Indonesia. There is no remarkable memory to make me return to this hotel.

We arrived at 9AM but were only able to check in at 3PM, which was quite a wait since early check-in wasn’t allowed. The nearby beach was a bit disappointing with a lot of plastic along the shoreline.

On the bright side, the resort itself is beautiful. The breakfast buffet had an amazing variety and everything was delicious. The facilities were top-notch and well maintained. Overall, it’s a lovely place to stay if you don’t mind the late check-in and prefer enjoying the pool and amenities over the beach.

Buffet breakfast was such and epicurean delight. Has many variety of cuisines; amazing display of food and baverages! 

The downside would be that the snacks in the snack bar in the room should be either labelled with price or should be given as complimentary snacks. reviews.title: Great stay
reviews.text:
Had a lovely stay facing the pool. The overall environment was nice including the pool and greenery. Room and bath tub was a good size. However, the separation of the tub was just using a curtain which was a bit strange as it could be better walled up to prevent moisture from getting to the bed and rest of room. It's a new hotel now but I imagine the quicker deterioration over time with this layout. Apart from that the bedding was comfortable, sufficiently firm and you can request pillows which are firmer. The cot was fine as well, but we had extra cot mattress as existing was quite thin. My only gripe is that they don't have enough baby hair chairs to loan to rooms, each meal that we needed to feed our baby we had to call to request for it and it would take awhile to arrive. I do not know why there is this shortage of baby chairs when it is not really expensive to hotels. Apart from that, breakfast was nice with an extensive spead and we enjoyed the freshly made juices, breakfast area was very kind to allow us sit and dine even past the official breakfast closing time as some guests may wake up later. The shuttle to Bali collection and the marriott beach club was nice too as the hotel was located far up a hill and you cannot easily walk outside in the vicinity without taking a car down. It was nice and private for those who prefer this kind of stay. We tried the kids club and it had a fun slide for kids, some toys and games.
Overall a great stay! We would recommend it!

reviews.title: An Absolute Masterpiece of Hospitality – Exceeded Every Expectation!
reviews.positives:
Words cannot describe how welcomed and cared for our family felt from the moment we arrived at this incredible resort. We booked two rooms for a 5-night family stay, and every single corner of the property was absolutely immaculate and exactly as a luxury hotel should be.

The highlight of our stay was the unparalleled service, especially when we faced a stressful situation. Having run out of pre-prepared meals for our 1-year-old baby during this long trip, we were struggling to find suitable options. A massive, heartfelt thank you goes to Chef Artawa, Andi, and the rest of the team at the Backstage Restaurant on the 3rd floor. They went completely out of their way to prepare custom meals for our baby with zero additional charges. Their genuine kindness turned a stressful moment into a beautiful memory.

On top of the exceptional dining service, the spa was absolutely amazing and provided us with one of the best wellness experiences we have ever had.
We will definitively revisit this hotel in the future, purely because the incredible staff treats their guests like family.

reviews.title: A True Hidden Gem, A Perfect Stay for those who are seeking luxury in the heart of Nusa Dua
reviews.positives:
From the moment we arrived at this beautiful resort, we knew we had found something special. It truly is a hidden gem! The atmosphere was serene and inviting, tucked away in such a peaceful setting that made it feel like a true escape from everyday life. A private beach to top it up that you can reach by a complementary shuttle, which also takes you to go nearest mall, can you beat that experience ? I guess not.

The breakfast was an absolute highlight — delicious, fresh, and thoughtfully prepared with plenty of options to satisfy every taste. It was the perfect start to each day. And not to forget onsite restaurants that offers all main stream food choices for lunch and dinner.

The beds were exceptionally comfortable, making it so hard to leave them in the morning! After a long day exploring, coming back to such cozy, well-kept rooms was pure bliss. Not to mention a spic span cleaning of the Housekeeping staff every time we leave it untidy, they turn it around and makes us smile, wow !!

But what really made the experience unforgettable was the staff. Every single person we interacted with was polite, warm, and genuinely happy to help. Their constant smiles and attention to detail created such a welcoming environment that made us feel right at home. Special mention of Miss Dewi Yulfa, Miss Castelo, Miss Rias, Miss Priti and Miss Yuna.

This resort offers not just a place to stay, but an experience to remember — charming, peaceful, and full of heart. I can’t wait to come back and would recommend it to anyone looking for a truly delightful getaway!

reviews.title: Awesome and we could go back here again.
reviews.positives:
We had a lovely and an awesome time at this resort. Staff here from Resort Manager (Alex) to driver to Bar (Bayu & Suli) and kitchen personals were awesome to hang around with and made us feel home away from home - resort home. We had buffer breakfast everyday on our stay and can’t complain about anything. We were there to celebrate mother-in -laws birthday and staff at Breakfast even greeted us with cake and song birthday song for my her. We had dinner at two other restaurants too - Backstage and Loin X, food was awesome, and atmosphere was great too. 
Pool is awesome just to relax in it. The pool Bar and staff looked after very well, and they also had a DJ on one of the afternoons. 
The R Bar – specially Bayu and Suli made our stay even better at this bar providing drinks to us and my family. Even Bayu went out of his way to create a drink which was awesome and refreshing to having that hot weather. If you there ask for Bayu’s special drinks which is not in the menu – you will not go wrong. 
Room service, pool, restaurant, breakfast, other staffs – can’t complain. We were treated like kings. 
Overall, I recommend this to stay and feel the great vibe here.

reviews.title: Pleasant stay overall
reviews.text:
The check in process was smooth. We reached earlier so the room’s not ready yet. Left the hotel for lunch and the hotel bothered to send us a WhatsApp informing the room was ready (ahead of the 3pm check in).

The room was clean and of decent size. The staff was helpful with our luggage and through our stay, they even delivered our  external food delivery to the room ( something which we didn’t experience in other hotel before) so kudos to the young and energetic staffs. 

Breakfast spread was good.  Seating was all alfresco so it could get pretty warm during hot weather. During our stay, the weather was pretty ok so it’s not really an issue. One thing though was that our check out time was pretty early so the kid didn’t have time to eat breakfast and those who are parents would know how hard and challenging the rush hour is. Asked if we could get 2 mini breads or donuts for takeaway to which the staff said it’s not in the policy to do so and the kid boarded flight with hungry stomach. We understand policy is policy however it would mean a lot for families on the rush if a consideration can be made for a kid.

Lastly , highlight of the stay was the kids club - they have list of activities which are engaging, staff was patient and good in entertaining kids during activities

Location wise - no direct access to beach (you have to take shuttle) and beach is shared.

They had 3 restaurants operated for buffet breakfast, the Backstage was the best amount all, we enjoyed the vibe and food there.

The only thing that could have been better was the lighting of the swimming pools. It was very dark at dawn and was unsafe to swim, especially with young kids.

Overall, we enjoyed the staff very much and would come back again.

reviews.title: New Modern Property
reviews.text:
The property is a 5 star hotel in terms of what it should have. The staff are friendly...however they just seem to miss the mark.
Eg. Pool on the main deck with nice looking pool bar. However, I ordered 2 frozen mango daiquiris....and it too them so long to deliver ...it was no longer frozen. Informed them of this and watched the lady put ice in and realitz...so it now was frozen however it was totally diluted and had very little Mango or alcohol in it. 
The pool staff, not attentive enough with cleaning up used towels and replacing clean towels.
One of the staff had cloths to wipe up the pool side tables when they brought drinks out.
Breakfast - Amazing selection. However the F&B staff whilst again very lovely and wanting to do their best, lacked the training and experience. Eg. I asked for a pot of Tea and some semi-skimmed milk. Pot of tea delivered, a mug (I expected a cup and saucer) and no teaspoon. 

There is no menu about what is offered on your TV or an online app.

If you want to look at a menu of one of the restaurants you have to walk there.

The hourly shuttle to the beach club is listed on a board in the corner of the entrance.

For a 5 star hotel I also expected a concierge area/desk however there wasn't one.

I also expected slippers in my room and there wasn't; so I had to bring for them.

Lastly every staff member asks you to give them a positive review on trip advisor. The lady at the pool bar, served me one drink and asked me to provide a Trip Advisor review and asked if I needed the QR code. The staff should focus on providing a high level of consistent service and then reviews will come. Way too pushy in this hotel.

Overall, I wouldn't recommend the hotel as the service i

reviews.title: Family holiday
reviews.text:
We truly enjoyed our stay to the fullest it was such a pleasure to stay in the renaissance best hotel stayed for a long time very big variety of breakfast with fresh juice station, crepe, omelette egg station anything you need for any different taste or culture hotel offers 4 different restaurants which you can all use for the breakfast also having wonderful options for dinner and lunch 

The pool is very big well maintained ice cream and drinks are awesome at the poolbar

And we stayed at a kingroom with pool view very special can see the ocean from our room even it’s a little far the room where definitely outstanding totally stunning blown away from the attention to detail in it also perfect room service available 

Hotel also has a very modern gym and spa separate for male and female with sauna ,steam room and jacuzzi there are also bicycles to use for driving around but staff also assisting with a nice buggy to get around the property 

We looking forward to come back to this place loved everything about it very easy to reach from the airport as new bridge has been build which gives quick access to hotel without any traffic 

Where were able to talk to manager to sort out a personal matter which we cannot  thank enough for his kind assistance thanks 
MR Kadik Rustiawan

reviews.title: Un séjour mémorable
reviews.positives:
Nous souhaitons exprimer notre sincère gratitude pour le séjour exceptionnel que nous avons passé dans votre hôtel. La chambre était vraiment magnifique, spacieuse et très confortable avec une très belle vue , offrant tout ce dont nous avions besoin pour un séjour des plus agréables.

Nous tenons également à remercier chaleureusement Mademoiselle SRI, votre charmante hôtesse d'accueil. Son accueil a été des plus chaleureux et nous avons été particulièrement touchés par l'attention délicate de nous offrir des noix de coco dans notre chambre pour célébrer nos 25 ans de mariage. Ce geste a rendu notre anniversaire encore plus mémorable.

Merci encore pour votre professionnalisme et votre hospitalité. Nous garderons un excellent souvenir de notre séjour au Renaissance Nusa Dua.

Recevez nos cordiales salutations Natalia et Olivier Fortis

reviews.title: Staffs are the most amazing and best assets of the hotel.
reviews.text:
I have booked a 3 nights stay for my sister and mother. They have so much fun that I am booking them a room again 3 months later. 
Firstly, the staffs are the most amazing. Special thanks to the reservations team who are so kind and helpful to arrange a nice room for my mother. And also to receptionist Risma for her warm welcome and help during check in. The hotel itself has excellent food especially the delicious Lion X (special thanks to the manager David and his team), the food is excellent and the service always immaculate. 
The included breakfast spread was excellent and my mother and sister did not get bored at all after 3 days. The hotel has alot of activities so you can really stayed in the whole day and still be very well entertained. Definitely a really good hotel that I would recommend to anyone that like to stay in Nusa dua area. Thank all the  excellent staffs!

reviews.title: Good hotel!
reviews.text:
It's a very clean hotel, and the staff are friendly. Nusa Dua doesn’t have a lot to do in a good way, so it's recommended for those who want to relax! There are a few delicious restaurants nearby, and we enjoyed dinner as well. I love alcohol, so it was nice to have drinks other than Bintang beer (laughs). The breakfast had a wide variety, and I didn't get bored even after three days. There were people from different nationalities, and it was interesting to see how everyone enjoyed breakfast in their own way. Pho and chicken soup were my best dishes. They are really delicious and can be eaten even after a hangover. Haha!

Thank you very much! I can recommend this hotel to anyone!

reviews.title: Ein tolles Hotel zum Wohlfühlen
reviews.positives: Das Frühstück war sensationell. Die Auswahl riesig. Das Restaurant Backstage war einfach Klasse auch das Abendessen war köstlich in allen Bereichen. Wir haben geschwärmt und auch gerne Trinkgeld gegeben. Es war TOP. Die Lage war gut allerdings zu Fuss doch ein wenig zum Laufen bis man im Zentrum ist. Es gibt auch einen Shuttle vom Hotel zum Bali Collection oder aber auch zum Strand. Strand wie alle in Bali eher nicht spektakulär. Dafür muss man auch nicht nach Bali reisen. Daher haben wir unsere Zeit am Pool genossen. Das war super mit Musik und Chill Out und Aktivitäten im Pool. Tolle Liegebetten sehr bequem. Das Essen war also das Highlight und auch die Pools waren toll und sauber.
reviews.negatives: Das Zimmer hat manchmal nach Feuchtigkeit gerochen. Ebenso wäre eine neue Poolstange im Poolbereich eine gute Investition. Sobald man die berührt schwankt die und man ist nicht mehr sicher. Der Whirlpool Bereich beim Pool könnte erneuert werden und sieht nicht mehr so sonderlich einladend aus.

reviews.title: Marvelous & Luxurious Staycation
reviews.text: Upon arrival, we were amazed with the property's location in the greenery and exclusive area together with Marriott. Glad that we we decided to stay in Nusa Dua and chose Renaissance. We truly optimized our time here and enjoyed everything especially the international breakfast. Our room is really spacious and ellegant, complete with all the amenities. The facilities, their 4 pools and spa,  are all stunning. They have also an exclusive beach area in Nusa Dua complemented with transportation back and forth to the hotel. I will definitely recommend this property to my friends visiting Bali in the future. Thank you Renaissance for making our stay really enjoyable and memorable. Thanks too for the early check in and late check out even you're fully booked  during our stay.

reviews.title: Bella esperienza
reviews.positives: Resort non enorme e con tutti i comfort. Personale cordiale e disponibile. Non lontano dall'aeroporto. Abbiamo mangiato bene e i bimbi hanno apprezzato il kids club. Per il piccolo abbiamo usufruito del servizio a pagamento di babysitting con una persona professionale e gentile con cui ci siamo trovati molto bene. Belle le piscine. Unica pecca: durante la prenotazione avevo richiesto opzioni vegetali per la colazione; opzioni salate ce n'erano, ma per una colazione dolce, a fronte di una scelta infinita di pezzi dolci per chi tollera latte e uova, non c'era invece nulla di vegano. L'ho fatto presente il primo giorno, ma non è cambiato nulla. Il bagno della camera mandava qualche cattivo odore, ma in generale ci siamo trovati bene. Il kids club era un po' piccolo, ma i bimbi si sono divertiti molto con le varie attività. In generale esperienza positiva.

reviews.text:
This is the best resort in Bali! I stayed for 5 days in Renaissance Bali Nusa  Dua resort and have a wonderful time. The resort is very very new with a beautiful modern design especially the swimming pool. Also the meal is very delicious and thank the sous chef Mr. I Made who offered  us special made meal. And also thank Mr. Yusuf and all the other crews for their wonderful service. Hope can return here soon ! 

Vincent
reviews.response: Hi Vincent! Thank you for this amazing review! So happy to hear that you had a wonderful time while staying at our brand new resort. We love to go beyond the template if that makes you happy. A little twist from the initial menu will never hurt. We miss you and look forward to welcoming you again soon, hopefully when all of the facilities are fully opened, so you can experience the best of the resort has to offer. Warm regards, Made Artawa, Yusuf and all of the Renaissance Bali Nusa Dua Resort's ambassadors.

reviews.negatives:
Nessuno spettacolo serale per intrattenere gli ospiti, esempio qualche danza tipica del posto o un po’ di buona musica dal vivo.
Mancanza di dosatori automatici nella doccia utili per un maggiore igiene, mancanza di menu digitali dei ristoranti con foto utili per capire meglio come sarebbe stato il piatto finale, soprattutto per il fatto che lì arrivano persone da tutto il mondo… 
Poi ho trovano una larva che strisciava sul nostro pavimento in camera, hanno mandato a pulire meglio la stanza, ma mi aspettavo un gift per scusarsi dell’accaduto dato che si tratta di un hotel di lusso a 5 stelle, ma questo non è avvenuto.

Même si on installe des palissades pour cacher la vue, elles sont totalement inefficaces pour l'odeur.
En ce qui concerne la vue vous avez le choix entre la vue parking( pas très romantique) et la vue piscine( très bruyant avec la diffusion en continu d'une bande son tonitruante)
Le petit-déjeuner est à un prix frisant l'indécence.
Nous avons demandé de garder la chambre jusqu'à 16 heures on nous a demander plus 1600000 roupies supplémentaires. C'est un hôtel sans âme nous regrettons amèrement notre choix.

Ausflugsmöglichkeiten beschränkt da die Sehenswürdigkeiten von Bali hoffnungslos überlaufen sind und der Transfer meist in Bussen oder Taxen mit schlechtem Komfort stattfinden.  Trotz kurzer entfernungen oft sehr sehr lange Fahrzeiten wegn Traffi jam und schlechter Strassen. Für 120 Km Distanz manchmal 5 Stunden Fahrzeit.

reviews.title: Heerlijk verblijf met prachtige zwembaden, topservice en fijne kamers
reviews.positives:
De medewerkers van het resort zijn geweldig vriendelijk, behulpzaam en enthousiast — echt een pluspunt van ons verblijf.

De omgeving is prachtig aangelegd, met meerdere zwembaden verspreid over het terrein. Het voelt ruim en rustig aan.

De kamers zijn mooi en ruim, met een heerlijk bad en een fijne douche. Ook fijn: ze liggen dicht bij de zwembaden.

Het ontbijt is uitgebreid en erg lekker, met veel keuze.

Ook overdag en 's avonds zijn er genoeg eetmogelijkheden in en rondom het hotel — voor ieder wat wils. Ook erg betaalbaar, maar natuurlijk duurder dan andere gebieden op Bali of buiten het resort. Je kunt gemakkelijk opgehaald worden met een taxi of scooter om ergens naartoe te gaan.
reviews.negatives:
We zijn al eens eerder in dit hotel geweest, waardoor bepaalde zaken extra opvallen. De locatie blijft prachtig en er is genoeg te doen, maar er zijn wel wat aandachtspunten.

Het activiteitenprogramma is al langere tijd hetzelfde. Hoewel het aanbod ruim is, zou wat vernieuwing welkom zijn.

Het onderhoud van de zwembaden kan beter. Begrijpelijk dat dit lastig is met de constante drukte, maar op sommige plekken is het echt nodig.

De strandlocatie die bij het hotel hoort, is beperkt en mist sfeer. Ter vergelijking: we zijn ook een dag naar de beachclub geweest bij het zusterhotel in Uluwatu — een wereld van verschil. Echt een aanrader!

reviews.text: Hotel ini sangat bagus, kolam renang yang besar ada 3 macam tema kolam renangnya, staff semua ramah hebat sekali. makanan enak, tetapi style menu nya sama kurang bervariasi sehingga kami agak bosan, pantai kecil terkesan dipaksakan, tapi secara keseluruhan hotel ini bagus semuanya, bakal menjadi favorit keluarga kami
reviews.response: Halo Pak Agus. Terima kasih sudah mereview hotel kami. Kami senang mendengar Anda dan keluarga mendapatkan pengalaman liburan yang berkesan. Saat ini kolam renang yang dibuka sudah bertambah satu, menjadi 4 totalnya. Kami terus mengevaluasi performa kami, baik dari segi layanan maupun produk, dan telah memperbarui menu-menu kami. Terima kasih lagi sudah menjadikan kami salah satu hotel favorit keluarga Anda. Jika ada kesempatan lain, dengan senang  hati kami akan menyambut Anda dan keluarga kembali. Salam hangat, Renaissance Bali Nusa Dua Resort

reviews.title: 위치빼고 좋아요.
reviews.text:
메인 풀에 있던 여자직원 한명이 정말 불친절해서 컴플레인 넣었고 바로 조취해 주긴 했어요.
호텔입장에서 고객은 하루 30만원 룸에 머무르는 수많은 사람중에 한명이지만, 고객 입장에선  발리 르네상스호텔에 가려고 300~400만원 비행기를 타고 공항에서 차를 부르고 15시간이 넘게 걸려 그곳에 도착합니다.  꼭 기억해주시길 바랍니다.
키즈클럽이 시간 별로 잘 되어 있어서 아이를 위해 선택한 호텔이였습니다.
키즈클럽에서 여러나라 아이들이 서로 어우러져 신나게 노는 모습이 참 좋았습니다.
키즈클럽 직원들도 친절했어요.
오후 3시 20분쯤 도착했는데 체크인하고 룸에 들어가는데 30분 넘게 걸렸고, 짐도 무거운데 직접 옮겼어요.
아이와 둘이 여러나라를 여행하느라 짐이 많았어요. 
룸청소는 정말 깨끗하게 해줘요.
